> ⚠️ Heads up: Pulsar is early stage and a work in progress. APIs are unstable
> and components are incomplete — some "bugs" may be known gaps. Thanks for
> reporting anyway!

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what's wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps or a minimal code sample that triggers the issue:

```elixir
# component usage that reproduces the problem
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include errors/stack traces if any).

## Environment

- Pulsar version / commit:
- Phoenix LiveView version:
- Elixir / OTP version:
- Generator mode or library mode:

## Additional context

Screenshots, theme/CSS details, or anything else that helps.
